rulings.Case Title: BILLY S. JOHNSON VS. ADVOCATE MINES, LIMITED et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 18, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant B.R. Funsten & Co.'s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant sustained its burden of production and plaintiff failed to present evidence creating a triable issue whether he was exposed to Armstrong floor tiles attributable to defendant. Plaintiff's objections to the 2006 deposition testimony of Mr. Funsten are sustained. =(220/HEK)
